subject: FW: Available properties
body:
________________________________

   This is the best house, quality/condition/size/price (?)/location out there right now on one of the islands you requested (LaGorce/Sunsets).  The view is not the best, it faces north, but the property is quite nice.  It's on La Gorce Island on approx. 30,000 sq. foot lot, with 158 feet on the water. The house is 10,296 sq. ft.. 6BR/7.5 Bath.  It used to be Cher's house many moons ago.  The house was redone by one of the owners after her.  Asking price: $14,900,000.   The lot next door is available for $5.5  So, the property can be incresed by another 25,000 - 30,000 sq. feet to make it over 300' on the bay.
http://www.realtor.com/search/listingdetail.aspx?ctid=1762&mnp=52&typ=1&sid=4deae99a9c094a4fb2b51f1819d4f706&pg=6&lid=1098322481&lsn=53&srcnt=66#Photo
 
This is the other house on La Gorce that might be interesting. It's 9,719 sq. feet,  7BR/office/8.5 baths.  200 feet of waterfront set on approx. an acre of land.  Asking price $16,500,000. 
http://www.realtor.com/search/listingdetail.aspx?ctid=1762&mnp=54&typ=1&sid=0efca471cf094c89a3fc8be067b86f0b&pg=3&lid=1097383563&lsn=25&srcnt=32#Photo
 
 
There is a house on Sunset Island  IV, looking over to Sunset III.  View is limited, but has good access to open bay.  Sits on a 100 x 200 lot.  This house was built this year, very modern design, good taste... very cool house.  It is not on the market yet, but I will be previewing it on Monday and will be able to give you more details then.   
 
There is something on Indian Creek Island (the most private of all the islands).  40 Indian Creek on 60,000 sq. foot lot, does not have wide bay view.   It's being totally renovated with completion time within the next 90 days.  It's 13,000 sq. feet  Asking price:.    $16,0000.00   (Note:  The ''2storylivingroom.zip'' attachment below wll show you photos.)
 
There are a couple of properties on N. Bay Road which may be interesting, but I believe you told me you prefer being on one of the islands.  Is N. Bay out of the question?  
 
 
Neli
 
Neli A. Santamarina, Broker
common ground investments corp.
305.538.0661 (office)
305.860.6421 (fax)
305.213.9411 (cell)



________________________________

Get trade secrets for amazing burgers. Watch "Cooking with Tyler Florence" on AOL Food <http://food.aol.com/tyler-florence?video=4?&NCID=aolfod00030000000002> .
